claims.comparison_population: asthma patients vs normal reference range
claims.supporting_quote: Quadrant analyses revealed that disease of patients with either elevated Feno or eosinophil counts demonstrated a clinical response to dupilumab... blood eosinophil counts and Feno are clinically relevant biomarkers to identify those at risk for asthma exacerbations.

coverage_notes: Manually grounded by Claude reading Stage3b abstracts directly (no ANTHROPIC_API_KEY available for automated Stage4b in this environment). Marker source: disease_clinical_biomarkers.py (real lab/clinical biomarker), not the gene-target panel.
